original_image_tags: The document is a dark, high-contrast scan of a typed page. The background is near-black with white text. A large, faint "RESTRICTED" stamp is visible at the top and bottom. Two hole-punch marks are on the left margin, and two white spots are at the bottom center and right.

elements.description: A dark page containing typed text. The text includes a witness account of an oblong, silver-streak object moving southwesterly. Visible text includes 'RESTRICTED' stamped faintly at the top and bottom, and 'Note: See Incident #112a in which the plane was perceived flying low.' The rest of the page is dark with some minor speckling and two hole punches on the left edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a 'RESTRICTED' stamp at the top and bottom and two hole-punch marks on the left, but Description B adds specific quoted text from the image that Description A does not mention, while Description A mentions other visual details like white spots that B does not.
